installFfmpeg.title: Install ffmpeg
installFfmpeg.description: WhisperFlow Studio needs ffmpeg to decode audio. Pick a package manager below, or open the vendor site.
installFfmpeg.noManagers: No supported package manager found for this platform.
installFfmpeg.statusNeedsAdmin: Requires admin — run in your own terminal
installFfmpeg.verifyFailed: {{manager}} reported a successful install, but {{package}} is still not found on the system. The download or extraction probably failed silently — please try another package manager.
installFfmpeg.scoopUpdateWarning: ⚠ The first Scoop install runs a full bucket update first — this can take several minutes before ffmpeg itself starts downloading.

stopBatch.title: Stop the whole batch?
stopBatch.messageWithFile: "{{fileName}}" is still running — stopping now throws away its progress, and every remaining file in the queue stays paused. Stop anyway?
stopBatch.messageGeneric: Progress on the current file will be discarded, and every remaining file in the queue stays paused. Stop anyway?

skipCurrent.title: Skip the current file?
skipCurrent.messageWithFile: Progress on "{{fileName}}" will be discarded and the batch will move on to the next file in the queue. Skip anyway?
skipCurrent.messageGeneric: Progress on the current file will be discarded and the batch will move on to the next file in the queue. Skip anyway?

delete.title: Delete profile
delete.message: Delete profile "{{name}}"? Its config.json will be removed — this can't be undone.

switchDirty.title: Discard unsaved changes?
switchDirty.message: You have unsaved changes. Switching to "{{name}}" will overwrite them — this can't be undone. Switch anyway?

errors.alreadyExists: A profile with that name already exists.

closeWhileRunning.title: WhisperFlow Studio
closeWhileRunning.detail: Force-closing will abort the current transcription job. Close anyway?

closeWhileBusy.title: WhisperFlow Studio
closeWhileBusy.detail: Force-closing will abort the current task. Download or transcription progress may be lost. Close anyway?

reasons.venv-init: Python virtual environment is being created
